title: MLX Vision Model Spec
description: MLX vision model specification for image description on Apple Silicon.
documentation:
## Purpose
Identifies an MLX-format vision-language model for image captioning and visual question answering on Apple Silicon. The MLX runtime exploits the unified memory architecture of Apple Silicon for fast, energy-efficient multimodal inference.

## When to use
Use this spec type when targeting the MLX backend for vision tasks on macOS. The default points to a 4-bit quantized Qwen3-VL model from the mlx-community organisation on HuggingFace. For GGUF-based vision inference use `media:model-spec;gguf;textable;vision`.

## Notes
MLX vision models require the mlx-vlm package in addition to the base mlx library. Ensure the target machine is Apple Silicon (M1 or later); MLX does not run on Intel Macs or non-Apple platforms.
